title: Passport program statistics - Canada.ca
content:
## Passport program statistics
Most passport statistics are updated once a month. Our fiscal year runs from April 1, 2026 to March 31, 2027.
Current year to date values on this page are calculated from April 1, 2026 to April 30, 2026.

## Applications received Footnote 1 Footnote 3
2026 to 2027 (fiscal year from April to March)
2025 to 2026 (fiscal year from April to March)

## Passports issued Footnote 2 Footnote 3
2026 to 2027 (fiscal year from April to March)
2025 to 2026 (fiscal year from April to March)

## Application  processing
Applications received
Applications received
